patch.value: pm list has only --deadline-before/after; agents doing incremental 'what changed since' sync must fetch all 900+ items and filter client-side. Add updated/created date-window filters (reuse resolveIsoOrRelative).
--updated-after/--updated-before and --created-after/--created-before accept ISO+relative; appear in filters block; wired into update-many, pm context, and MCP contracts.

pm list has only --deadline-before/after; agents doing incremental 'what changed since' sync must fetch all 900+ items and filter client-side. Add updated/created date-window filters (reuse resolveIsoOrRelative).

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Shipped on branch cli-incremental-context-and-bulk-ops-20260604. Added --updated-after/--updated-before/--created-after/--created-before to runList + all list* commands + MCP pm_list contracts. Reuses the shared signed-relative resolver (resolveIsoOrRelative): ISO timestamps (primary 'changed since last window' case) or signed offsets (-2h/-7d past, +1d future; units h/d/w/m, m=months, no minutes unit). Raw inputs echoed in filters block. Also wired into update-many/close-many --filter-updated-*/--filter-created-* family.

patch.value: Added --updated-after/-before/--created-after/-before to runList, list* commands, update-many/close-many --filter-* family, and MCP pm_list contracts; signed-relative + ISO; 100%-tested
list/MCP accept updated/created windows; raw echoed in filters
Implemented and verified end-to-end + unit tests
Delivered incremental updated/created date-window filters on list + bulk-ops + MCP
